one_liner: One interface, every model. Sits between Claude Code and the providers, swaps the engine per task (Opus->heavy reasoning, Sonnet->code, Haiku->fast) so you pay only for what the task needs.

source.note: Clean, key-safe build. Your keys stay in your env; no third-party proxy.

runtime.note: Config lives at modules/model-router/config.json (providers read from $ENV vars). See modules/model-router/README.md.

project_mappings.use: Every text/agent job in the OS routes through here; the video lane (ComfyUI) sits beside it.
